name: Maurice
lastAssessment: LLMTRUST business health check (Mar 15, 22:57). 31 open issues: 11 strategic, 9 specs, 8 features, 1 infra, 0 bugs, 2 revenue. Zero PRs merged recently — team velocity is stalled. Key findings: (1) Pricing mismatch critical — UI shows $19/$49 but Stripe charges $9.99/$29.99 (Salomé, #37). (2) Competitive threat from onyx.app leaderboard (#35). (3) Execution paralysis — 21 issues created, zero code shipped (#22). DECISION: This week's focus is pricing fix (#37) + Trust Score MVP (#43/#41) + kill the spec-writing culture. Commented on #22 with hard priorities. We need a merged PR users can touch by Friday.
